overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, following a character walking along a covered urban sidewalk at night. The scene features neon-lit digital billboards, futuristic architecture with red structural pillars, and wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with large digital advertising displays

events.description: large digital billboard on right changes from character advertisement to text display

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath neon-lit billboards and digital displays

entered.detail: metal and glass canopy covering the pedestrian walkway with geometric truss structure
massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements with bright neon colors
tall standalone digital display showing purple-tinted character advertisement
futuristic building facade across the street with large circular green-lit windows
thick red structural columns with black and yellow hazard stripes at base

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered cyberpunk city walkway at night, with the camera following a character past a large digital kiosk and beneath massive glowing billboards. The wet red-tiled pavement reflects the neon lights from the green circular building structures visible across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with industrial red pillars and striped building facade

events.description: large digital billboard exits view as camera moves past it, revealing yellow and black striped building facade
woman in gray dress walks past camera in opposing direction on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the environment transitions past the large billboard area

notable_agents.action: woman walking toward camera in gray dress, passing by on the right

entered.detail: building exterior with bold diagonal yellow and black warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the large digital billboard, revealing more of the industrial red support pillars and a distinctive yellow-black striped building facade on the right. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction as the covered walkway continues deeper into the urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching pedestrian gathering near storefront

events.description: approaching group of pedestrians standing ahead near illuminated storefront

agents.ego_description: walking toward a group of people gathered ahead near a purple-lit storefront entrance

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and conversing near the storefront entrance ahead

entered.detail: building entrance with bright purple neon lighting and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues toward a group of pedestrians standing near a storefront with vivid purple neon lighting. The yellow-black striped building fades from view as the camera approaches the gathering, with the red support pillars now appearing further to the left as the perspective shifts forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit cyberpunk walkway that transitions from a vista of glowing billboards to a crowded storefront area. It begins by following a character past a large digital kiosk, where the wet red-tiled pavement reflects the vivid green lights of circular buildings across the street. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts past massive billboards to reveal industrial red support pillars and a distinctive yellow-black striped building facade. The scene then opens further into the urban corridor, passing a pedestrian in the opposite direction before the striped facade fades from view. Finally, the camera approaches a group of pedestrians gathered near a storefront bathed in vivid purple neon lighting as the red pillars recede to the left.
